EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} changed system file {object.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed system file {object.fullpath} using suspicious file "{subject.process.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed system files on host {event_src.host}
System file {object.fullpath} was changed on host {event_src.host}
System files were changed using suspicious file "{subject.process.name}" on host {event_src.host}
System files were changed on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed system files using suspicious file "{subject.process.name}" on host {event_src.host}
A user with ID {subject.account.id} changed system file {object.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
A user with ID {subject.account.id} changed system files on host {event_src.host}
